tasks.title: Create Dark Mode Toggle Button Component
tasks.description: Build a reusable DarkModeToggle component that renders a button with sun/moon icons to indicate light/dark modes
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Verify the component renders without errors
2. Test that clicking the button toggles between sun and moon icons
3. Ensure the button has proper accessibility attributes (aria-label)
4. Verify hover states and transitions work correctly
5. Test that the component correctly reads the initial theme state from the HTML element

tasks.title: Implement Theme Persistence Logic with Custom Hook
tasks.description: Create a custom React hook that manages theme state, localStorage persistence, and HTML class manipulation
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Test localStorage persistence by toggling theme and refreshing the page
2. Verify the HTML element's 'dark' class is correctly added/removed
3. Test SSR compatibility by ensuring no errors during server-side rendering
4. Verify fallback to dark theme when localStorage is empty
5. Test that theme changes are immediately reflected in the UI

tasks.title: Integrate Dark Mode Toggle into App Header
tasks.description: Add the DarkModeToggle component to the application header in the providers file and update styles for light mode support
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Verify the toggle button appears in the header on both desktop and mobile views
2. Test that toggling dark mode updates all UI elements correctly
3. Ensure no flash of unstyled content on page refresh
4. Test that the theme preference persists across page navigation
5. Verify light mode colors are properly applied throughout the app
6. Test responsiveness of the header with the new toggle button
